variables.name: POCKET_ID_DOMAIN
variables.description: Public domain name for Pocket ID.

variables.name: POCKET_ID_POSTGRES_SERVER
variables.description: Server where the Pocket ID PostgreSQL database is located.

variables.name: POCKET_ID_POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: User used to connect to the Pocket ID PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: POCKET_ID_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password used to connect to the Pocket ID PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: POCKET_ID_POSTGRES_DATABASE
variables.description: Name of the Pocket ID PostgreSQL database.
